content: My daughter is a law student with a bright future. She was attacked in our own community, in broad view of security cameras — which, of course, were conveniently malfunctioning. We have no doubt this is a targeted crime. We have no grudge against any individual, but we demand justice. We have spoken to senior police officers to ensure this case is handled with urgency and sensitivity. We are not pressuring anyone — we are simply insisting on due process. We have full faith in the system. We have provided all medical and digital records. We expect no delays.
